name: Money Stuff
description: Bloomberg Opinion's Matt Levine and Katie Greifeld on markets, deals, and financial weirdness.

name: Odd Lots
description: Bloomberg's Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway on macro, markets, and how things actually work.

name: Masters in Business
description: Bloomberg's Barry Ritholtz interviews people and ideas that shape markets and investing.

name: Business Breakdowns
description: Colossus network -- deep-dive breakdowns of individual businesses with investors who know them well.

name: Invest Like the Best
description: Colossus network -- Patrick O'Shaughnessy interviews top investors, founders, and experts.

name: Animal Spirits
description: Michael Batnick and Ben Carlson (Ritholtz Wealth Management) on markets and investing.

name: We Study Billionaires
description: The Investor's Podcast Network's flagship value-investing show.

name: Macro Musings
description: David Beckworth (Mercatus Center) on monetary policy -- academic-leaning.

name: Forward Guidance
description: Blockworks -- rates, liquidity, and Fed plumbing.

name: The Market Huddle
description: Patrick Ceresna and Kevin Muir on markets and macro.

name: Top Traders Unplugged
description: Niels Kaastrup-Larsen -- systematic/CTA and trend-following perspective.

name: Bloomberg Surveillance
description: Bloomberg's daily flagship markets show -- high volume.

name: Value Investing with Legends
description: Columbia Business School -- interviews with veteran value investors.

name: The Acquirers Podcast
description: Tobias Carlisle -- deep value investing.

name: Behind the Balance Sheet
description: Stephen Clapham -- forensic/fundamental equity analysis.

name: Yet Another Value Podcast
description: Andrew Walker -- special situations and event-driven investing.

name: Acquired
description: Ben Gilbert and David Rosenthal -- long-form company histories, several semiconductor episodes.

name: The Circuit
description: Ben Bajarin and Jay Goldberg -- the semiconductor-industry podcast.

name: Sharp Tech with Ben Thompson
description: Ben Thompson and Andrew Sharp -- tech strategy and business models (Stratechery's companion podcast).

name: Dwarkesh Podcast
description: Dwarkesh Patel -- AI capex, compute, and increasingly market-relevant AI-industry interviews.

name: No Priors
description: Conviction -- AI industry perspective.

name: Latent Space
description: The AI Engineer Podcast -- AI industry, more technical/builder-focused.

name: Goldman Sachs Exchanges
description: Goldman Sachs -- house views across markets and macro.

name: Capital Allocators
description: Ted Seides -- institutional allocator perspective.

name: The Twenty Minute VC
description: Harry Stebbings -- venture capital and private markets.

name: All-In Podcast
description: Chamath, Jason Calacanis, David Sacks, and David Friedberg -- tech/VC/macro roundtable.
